_comment: Edit this file to control what shows on your portfolio.
_comment_projects: Add repo names (e.g. 'old-project') or full URLs to hide from Projects tab
_comment_certificates: Add certificate titles to hide from the Certificates tab
_comment_priority: Pin these repo names to the top, in the order listed
_comment_buildingBlocks: Small utilities, prototypes, and experiments (Building Blocks section)
_comment_archive: Older learning projects and explorations (Archive section) — everything not in priority or buildingBlocks lands here
